text:
On Thu, Jan 7, 2010 at 2:40 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of biology/ncbi-toolkit,

> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/142408

Approved, Thanks!
